category_sources: source_facts.description says Compare and mark up LaTeX file differences; official GitHub README says it compares two LaTeX files and marks up differences.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is latexdiff; source_facts.name is latexdiff.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the full manual on CTAN mirrors and releases on CTAN; CTAN is the package homepage from source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ftilmann/latexdiff, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify LaTeX-aware diff and markup functionality.
